issues.detail: The skill does not handle HTTP 429 rate limiting or missing API key errors, limiting robustness.
The skill is implemented only in Python, lacking Node.js support, restricting cross-platform usage.

scenarios.name: text-to-video Gen-3 Turbo with poll-and-download
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to guess wrong host or endpoint, omit the X-Runway-Version header, and mistype the model id, whereas treatment posts to api.dev.runwayml.com/v1/image_to_video with model gen3a_turbo and polls /tasks/{id} until SUCCEEDED exactly as documented.

scenarios.name: animate local product PNG via data URI
scenarios.rationale: Baseline usually proposes a separate image-hosting step rather than the data:image/png;base64 promptImage payload; treatment base64-encodes the file inline and submits the documented image_to_video call with correct headers and polling.
